summary: Completed testing of Pro pricing card validation mode features. All features working correctly - two-card pricing layout (Free $0 + Pro $10/month), 'Most Popular' badge on Pro card, 'Shape the Premium Version' title with subtitle, 'Suggest Features' button expands inline form for logged-in users, non-logged-in users redirected to login, suggestions from pricing page stored with source: 'pricing_page', admin feedback page displays Source column with 'Pricing' and 'Dashboard' badges.
passed_tests: Landing page shows two pricing cards (Free $0 and Pro $10/month)
Pro card has 'Most Popular' badge floating above card
Pro card shows 'Shape the Premium Version' title
Pro card shows subtitle 'Tell us what you'd love in the $10/month plan.'
Pro card has 'Suggest Features' button with data-testid='pricing-suggest-btn'
Free card features: Unlimited links, Retreat blocks, Basic themes, Profile analytics
Pro card features: Everything in Free, Video hero backgrounds, All premium themes, Advanced analytics, Custom domain, Priority support
Non-logged-in users clicking 'Suggest Features' redirected to /login?redirect=/pricing
Logged-in users clicking 'Suggest Features' expands inline form (no page redirect)
Inline form has textarea with placeholder 'What features would make this worth $10/month for you?'
Inline form has 500 character limit with visible counter (0/500)
Inline form has Cancel and Send buttons
Inline form submission stores suggestion with source: 'pricing_page'
Success message shown: 'Thanks for helping shape the premium version'
Admin /admin/feedback page shows Source column
Admin page displays 'Pricing' badge for pricing_page suggestions (yellow/amber color)
Admin page displays 'Dashboard' badge for dashboard suggestions (different color)
Admin page has User Email, Suggestion, Date, Source columns
Admin page has Back to Dashboard link and Refresh button
POST /api/suggestions accepts source: 'pricing_page' field
GET /api/admin/feedback returns source field in response
API response excludes MongoDB _id field, includes 'id' string field
seed_data_creation: Added 2 test suggestions with source='pricing_page' during testing. These are visible in admin feedback page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pro pricing card validation mode fully tested. The pricing section now has two cards: Free ($0) and Pro ($10/month). Pro card has collaborative validation approach with 'Shape the Premium Version' title and 'Suggest Features' button that opens inline form. Suggestions from pricing page are stored with source='pricing_page' and displayed in admin feedback page with 'Pricing' badge (yellow). Dashboard suggestions show 'Dashboard' badge. Admin emails: admin@gotolinks.com, localtest@test.com, analyticstest@test.com
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. All features implemented correctly per requirements.
